name: Guardarian
description: Non-custodial EU-regulated fiat on/off-ramp API for Web3 projects.

seo.title: Guardarian — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Guardarian: Non-custodial EU-regulated fiat on/off-ramp API for Web3 projects.

when_to_use: Non-custodial EU-regulated fiat on-ramp for Web3 DeFi and NFT platforms
Fiat off-ramp for European crypto wallet users cashing out to EUR/GBP
KYC-handled fiat gateway API for Web3 developers avoiding compliance burden
Local bank and card on-ramp for crypto exchanges targeting EU users

pros: No KYC for small purchases under limit
Clean REST API for Web3 integrations
review.verdict: Solid non-custodial on/off-ramp for EU-facing Web3 apps that value compliance over broad reach.
review.best_for: EU-based Web3 wallets and dApps needing regulated non-custodial fiat rails
review.not_for: US-heavy apps or teams needing deep liquidity across many regions

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metering; scales with consumption, no explicit peak-lock.
